alerts.title: 🚨 CRITICAL: LinkedIn API Access Denied — All Data Blocked
alerts.meta: 403 ACCESS_DENIED on campaigns, analytics (both windows), and creatives endpoints. Scopes missing: r_ads, r_ads_reporting, r_organization_social. No live spend, CTR, CPL, lead, impression, or frequency data can be read. All campaign metrics show 0. Immediate token/permission fix required — every hour of delay means blind spend.

alerts.title: 🚨 CRITICAL: Zero Conversions Across All Campaigns ($0 Readable Spend)
alerts.meta: History store confirms Day 1 baseline of 0 leads, $0 spend, 0 CTR. While actual spend may be running on LinkedIn, it is invisible to the dashboard. Per alert rules: zero conversions on >$50 spend = HIGH. Cannot confirm budget delivery or lead capture is functioning.

alerts.title: ⚠️ WARNING: 30-Day History Shows No Prior Data Baseline
alerts.meta: read_history(30) returned a single record dated 2026-03-06 with all zeros. No rolling 7-day averages can be computed for CTR drop, CPL spike, or frequency thresholds. All alert thresholds (CTR >15% drop, CPL >20% spike, Freq >3.5) are currently unverifiable until API access is restored and at least 7 days of data accumulate.

alerts.title: ⚠️ WARNING: Creative Performance Unreadable
alerts.meta: linkedin_get_creatives returned 403 on 'name' field. Cannot audit headline performance, fatigue scores, or identify which ad variants are underperforming. Copy refresh decisions are based on structural analysis and LinkedIn B2B benchmarks, not live CTR data.

opportunities.title: 🟢 OPPORTUNITY: NSL/HockeyOne Case Study Ads Not Yet in Rotation
opportunities.meta: HockeyOne case study (9x fan engagement, 264% Facebook reach) and NSL (51.8M views, 37K+ moments) are proven conversion assets. Single-metric proof-point ads using these numbers typically outperform generic benefit ads by 2-3x on LinkedIn. Launch as Lead Gen Form ads targeting Leagues & Associations.

opportunities.title: 🟢 OPPORTUNITY: Islamic Solidarity Games angle untapped for Broadcasters
opportunities.meta: ISG Riyadh 2025 (50,000+ clips, 7.5M views, 57 NOCs served) is a high-credibility proof point for Broadcasters & OTT buyers evaluating AI highlights at scale. Create a dedicated campaign targeting Broadcast Technology Directors and Head of Digital at OTT platforms.

opportunities.title: 🟢 OPPORTUNITY: AXIS + PULSE Bundle Pitch to Mid-Tier Leagues
opportunities.meta: Table Tennis England case study (250+ hours saved, 3x upload increase, +105% total views) speaks directly to resource-constrained mid-tier leagues. A paired AXIS+PULSE message — 'produce more, spend less time' — is underrepresented in current assumed campaign mix.

opportunities.title: 🔵 ACTION: Resolve LinkedIn API Permissions Before Next Spend Cycle
opportunities.meta: Every day without analytics access means budget is spent without measurable ROI. Required OAuth scopes: r_ads, r_ads_reporting, r_organization_social, rw_ads. Estimated fix time: 30–60 mins with LinkedIn Campaign Manager admin access. Assign immediately.
